title: Chainable Pickaxes
description:
Upgraded pickaxes with chains!

Created using MCreator.
body:
Chainable pickaxes! Use chains to upgrade your pickaxes.

![Chained Pickaxes being hung up with chains](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/87293a56aa0c4d1dbfa4d7d8affd6c533b8c408f.png)

Attach chains to your pickaxes with a chain upgrade template! to increase your tool's durability and speed!

Unchain your pickaxes by using a smithing table, with shears, chained pickaxe, and a iron nugget.

To safely uninstall the mod, unchain all your pickaxes, so they are converted to normal Minecraft ones, then save the world and remove the mod.
